roundup.title: Hy3, DeepSeek V4 & Fable 5 Drop in One Day
roundup.subtitle: 295B MoE、1M上下文与世界模型实时对战同日亮相
headline: @TencentHunyuan 发布 295B MoE 的 Hy3，Apache 2.0 开源并原生支持 vLLM，@vllm_project 与 @NousResearch 同步验证其工具调用与推理能力。@OpenRouter 数据显示 DeepSeek V4 已达每周 6.6T tokens 领先量级。
@claudeai 上线 Claude Fable 5，@cursor_ai 确认其在 CursorBench 登顶；@karpathy 与 @arena 同时展示 5B 参数模型实时生成可玩 Rocket League 对战，20 FPS 单卡 B200 完成全场模拟。
@OpenAIDevs 同步推出 GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini，p95 延迟降低 25%，@GeminiApp 则让 Gemini Spark 支持实时事件追踪与自动邮件分析。@MiniMax_AI 确认 M3 将在巴黎 RAISE 周展示开放权重与多模态进展。
@HuggingPapers 发布 DataComp-VLM 基准，证明数据混合优于过滤，8B 模型准确率提升 5.4pp；@fchollet 强调未来 benchmark 必须同时报告成本效率。

deepDives.title: TencentHunyuan Hy3 295B MoE 正式开源
deepDives.summary: Hy3 是当日最大规模开源 MoE 模型，定位 agentic 与 coding 场景，Apache 2.0 许可且免费 API 试用两周。

facts.text: Hy3 295B MoE 模型 Apache 2.0 开源，商用友好
facts.quote: Hy3 is here. 295B MoE. Best in its size class. Rivals trillion-scale flagships.

facts.text: Hy3 原生支持 vLLM，内置 tool-call、reasoning parser 与 MTP speculative decoding
facts.quote: runs natively in vLLM from day 0, with tool-call and reasoning parsers and MTP speculative decoding

bullish.text: strong on coding, tool-calling reliability, reasoning, and 256K long-context

deepDives.title: 5B 模型实时生成 Rocket League 对战
deepDives.summary: Kyutai Labs 用 5B 参数世界模型实现 2v2 Rocket League 全场实时模拟，单卡 B200 达到 20 FPS。

facts.text: 5B 参数模型以 20 FPS 生成完整可玩 Rocket League 对战
facts.quote: Four people just played a full 2v2 Rocket League match inside a neural network... 20 frames a second

facts.text: @emollick 确认该演示为“multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat”
facts.quote: multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat

bullish.text: incredible... models would be able to create these awesome, rich, playable worlds

bullets.text: OpenAI 发布 GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini，推理与工具调用能力与 mini 版同价
bullets.quote: bringing reasoning and tool use to our Realtime mini lineup at the same cost

bullets.text: Gemini Spark 支持实时事件追踪与自动邮件分析
bullets.quote: intelligently track topics and react to events in real time

bullets.text: tinygrad 本地推理达 100 tok/s，单机支持 40 人团队
bullets.quote: ~100 tok/s and one machine is enough for a 40 person org

bullets.text: Gemma 4 在 Apple Silicon 上 MLX 加速近 90%，MTP 默认开启
bullets.quote: nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX

bullets.text: DataComp-VLM 基准：数据混合使 8B 模型准确率提升 5.4pp
bullets.quote: enabling an 8B model to hit 63.6% accuracy (+5.4pp over FineVision)

bullets.text: @fchollet 呼吁 benchmark 必须同时报告成本效率
bullets.quote: report efficiency scores, e.g. "75% at a cost per task of $10."

topTweets.author: @TencentHunyuan
topTweets.text: 295B MoE Hy3 Apache 2.0 开源，免费 API 试用两周
topTweets.whyItMatters: 最大规模开源 MoE 直接支持 agentic 场景

topTweets.author: @TheRundownAI
topTweets.text: 5B 模型 20 FPS 实时生成 Rocket League 全场对战
topTweets.whyItMatters: 世界模型进入可玩实时游戏阶段

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: Hy3 原生 vLLM 支持，含 tool-call 与 MTP 解码
topTweets.whyItMatters: 295B MoE 推理栈落地关键一步

topTweets.author: @cursor_ai
topTweets.text: Claude Fable 5 登顶 CursorBench 但单任务成本最高
topTweets.whyItMatters: 编码 Agent 性能与成本权衡新标杆

topTweets.author: @OpenAIDevs
topTweets.text: GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini 推理工具能力上线，延迟降 25%
topTweets.whyItMatters: Realtime API 向 agentic 方向升级

takeaways: 295B MoE 与 1M 上下文模型已进入生产可部署阶段，vLLM 原生支持成为标配。
世界模型从研究演示转向可玩实时环境，20 FPS 单卡已可支撑多人对战。
benchmark 必须同时报告成本与效率，纯准确率数字已无参考价值。
开源模型在本地推理速度与对齐问题上持续追赶云端，tinygrad 与 MLX 加速值得关注。
Agent 评估工具（LangSmith、WorldModelGym）正从实验走向生产数据闭环。

items.author: @elonmusk
items.text: AI+Optimus will enable universal excellent healthcare that is better than anyone receives today
items.whyItMatters: AI 机器人将提供优于顶级医疗的普惠服务，具身智能应用信号

items.author: @MiniMax_AI
items.text: MiniMax is heading to RAISE Week in Paris 🇫🇷 Find us at Booth 32D... talking M3, open weights, multimodal AI, and where frontier AI is moving next
items.whyItMatters: M3 模型、开放权重与多模态前沿部署，AI 工程师关注开源/多模态进展

items.author: @emollick
items.text: I have been playing these world models/games since the first diffusion DOOM, and multiplayer at 20 FPS is pretty neat. "A dream of rocket league," indeed.
items.whyItMatters: 多玩家实时世界模型 20FPS 演示，生成式模拟新方向

items.author: @AndrewYNg
items.text: Congratulations @tylerweitzman - very impressive and I'm thrilled to hear a continuation your Stanford ML work now ranks #1 in TTS!
items.whyItMatters: TTS 基准新 #1，语音模型性能突破信号

items.author: @ThePrimeagen
items.text: ok I think I have ai pyschosis reason? I think its so fun building a harness to play my game that I am not even making much progress on my game. I think I am a tools dev in my heart
items.whyItMatters: AI harness构建实战分享，聚焦自动化测试与工具开发

items.author: @TheAITimeline
items.text: Is One Layer Enough? Training a Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training. Training a single transformer layer recovers most performance gains achieved by full-parameter RL training for LLMs.
items.whyItMatters: 单层 RL 训练即可媲美全参数更新，挑战传统 post-training 假设。

items.author: @MatthewBerman
items.text: Create your own benchmark. LLM as judge. Loop.
items.whyItMatters: LLM-as-judge 自建 benchmark 方法，实用评估技巧。

items.author: @AnthropicAI
items.text: The J-space lets us read, audit, and shape what Claude is actively thinking about—useful tools for keeping models trustworthy as they grow more capable. And it suggests surprising parallels between language models and our own minds. Read the full paper: https://transformer-circuits.pub/2026/workspace/index.html
items.whyItMatters: 新可解释性方法J-space，助力模型可信度与对齐研究

items.author: @vllm_project
items.text: 🎉 @TencentHunyuan's Hy3, the full release following the Hy3 Preview, runs natively in vLLM from day 0, with tool-call and reasoning parsers and MTP speculative decoding, verified on @NVIDIA and @AMD hardware. Hy3 is a Mixture-of-Experts model built for agentic workflows, coding, and long-horizon reasoning, and it's Ap
items.whyItMatters: 295B MoE Hy3原生vLLM支持，Agentic/Coding推理优化

items.author: @OpenAIDevs
items.text: GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini is now available in the API, bringing reasoning and tool use to our Realtime mini lineup at the same cost as GPT-Realtime-mini. We’ve reduced p95 latency by at least 25% across Realtime voice models through improved caching.
items.whyItMatters: Realtime API新增推理/工具能力，延迟降25%

items.author: @ArtificialAnlys
items.text: DeepSeek V4 Flash (max) completes tasks for <$0.04 across all six indices while scoring mid-pack, and GLM-5.2 (max) leads open weights score with a Cost per Task of $0.26 to $0.58. Frontier capability comes at a steep premium.
items.whyItMatters: 多领域能力指数基准，成本-性能对比新数据

items.author: @LangChain
items.text: When your agents take a tumble, LangSmith helps them get back up. LangSmith Evaluation lets you evaluate performance with real production data so you can understand every spill and improve agent quality.
items.whyItMatters: 生产级Agent评估工具，支持真实数据迭代

items.author: @NousResearch
items.text: Hy3, the new 295B MoE model from @TencentHunyuan, is now free in Nous Portal for the next two weeks! ... strong on coding, tool-calling reliability, reasoning, and 256K long-context.
items.whyItMatters: 295B MoE模型免费试用两周，编码/工具调用/长上下文强。

items.author: @SakanaAILabs
items.text: We released our in-house Japanese, English, and Chinese translation tool, Sakana Translate! Try it→ https://chat.sakana.ai/translate 🐟 • Translate: Handles long text in real time • Proofread: Tone and phrasing refined, with tracked changes • Ask: Nuanced word choices clarified
items.whyItMatters: Sakana推出专精日语文化的翻译工具，Namazu模型支持敬语与语境精准处理。

items.author: @HuggingPapers
items.text: DataComp-VLM A massive benchmark for data-centric VLM training. 160 datasets, 6T tokens, and a key result: the right data mix beats filtering, enabling an 8B model to hit 63.6% accuracy (+5.4pp over FineVision).
items.whyItMatters: DataComp-VLM基准揭示数据混合优于过滤，8B模型准确率提升5.4pp。

items.author: @fchollet
items.text: Reporting benchmark results as a scalar number, e.g. "75% on XYZ" is completely meaningless at this point. You should always report efficiency scores, e.g. "75% at a cost per task of $10."
items.whyItMatters: 强调基准必须报告效率成本，而非单一准确率数字。

items.author: @TheRundownAI
items.text: Four people just played a full 2v2 Rocket League match inside a neural network. Every frame they saw came out of a 5B-parameter model dreaming the whole game, 20 frames a second, on a single Nvidia B200... @kyutai_labs and @gen_intuition built MIRA... open-sourced the code, the technical report, and a 1,000-match-hour
items.whyItMatters: 5B参数模型实时模拟Rocket League全场，开源代码与数据集。

items.author: @GeminiApp
items.text: Gemini Spark can now intelligently track topics and react to events in real time. Try the prompt in the next post to get tailored game analyses emailed to you after your favorite team plays:
items.whyItMatters: Gemini 新 Agent 功能实时事件追踪与自动化响应

items.author: @OpenRouter
items.text: V4 also broke DeepSeek away from the other Chinese models. At 6.6T weekly tokens it now runs well ahead of Xiaomi (4.0T), Minimax (3.6T), and Tencent (3.8T), and it edges out Anthropic's 6.1T as the highest-token-volume model lab on the platform.
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek V4 每周 6.6T tokens 领先所有模型实验室

items.author: @NVIDIAAI
items.text: The Nemotron family just passed 100M downloads! Huge thank you to the community building with us and showing what’s possible with open models. Cheers to OSS 🍾
items.whyItMatters: NVIDIA Nemotron 开源模型家族下载量突破 1 亿

items.author: @SemiAnalysis_
items.text: DeepSeek V4 ships with two variants allowing it to hit 1M Context. @kimbochen breaks down the attention changes and the Mega MOE speeding up compute.
items.whyItMatters: DeepSeek V4 支持 1M 上下文 + Mega MOE 架构细节

items.author: @fal
items.text: ⚡️ Ideogram V4 Fast and Instant are now available on fal - The fastest Ideogram V4 variants... Full images in 0.4 seconds on Instant and one second on Fast
items.whyItMatters: Ideogram V4 极速推理服务上线

items.author: @ID_AA_Carmack
items.text: Memory cost and capacity are significant issues for AI accelerators... NAND flash is over 100 times cheaper per GB than HBM... specialized pin protocol... split memory system
items.whyItMatters: AI 加速器内存架构深度思考

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: We are launching Workers Cache, a regionally tiered cache that sits directly in front of your Worker entrypoints. Infinitely composable, configured via standard HTTP headers.
items.whyItMatters: Workers 新缓存层，AI 推理优化

items.author: @Cloudflare
items.text: #CloudflareConnect 2026... The agentic conference of the year. Five tracks: agents, web frameworks, network and infrastructure, secure AI, and security.
items.whyItMatters: Agentic AI 基础设施会议

items.author: @PrimeIntellect
items.text: Today, prime-rl gets a first-class Algorithms layer — the first step toward making it the most expressive RL codebase. Six algorithms ship built-in: GRPO, MaxRL, OPD, OPSD, SFT, and ECHO. Bringing your own algorithm is writing one file, not rewriting trainer internals.
items.whyItMatters: 开源RL框架新增6种算法，支持自定义

items.author: @RedHat_AI
items.text: Claude Code and Codex are great interfaces. But they send requests to a third-party LLM by default. Token limits, data privacy, model deprecations like Fable and Mythos. Here's how to fix it: deploy Nemotron or Mistral (or any other open source model) on OpenShift AI with @vllm_project
items.whyItMatters: 用开源模型+vLLM自建Agent推理端点

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: We've been running locally, ~100 tok/s and one machine is enough for a 40 person org. We don't even have DFlash up yet, the speed should double when we do.
items.whyItMatters: tinygrad 本地推理达 100 tok/s，单机支持 40 人团队，成本极低。

items.author: @__tinygrad__
items.text: I cannot believe how good GLM 5.2 is. Several weeks in now and it's mostly all I have been using. It doesn't have the alignment issue of cloud AI...
items.whyItMatters: GLM 5.2 本地模型实用性强，无云端对齐问题，适合工程部署。

items.author: @AssemblyAI
items.text: Ordering a prescription by voice leaves no room for "close enough." Drug names, dosages, patient details—every word has to land. @stefanjblos built a voice agent that does exactly that—and gets the messy, high-stakes language of medicine.
items.whyItMatters: 展示语音AI在医疗高风险场景的实际应用

items.author: @googleaidevs
items.text: As we build tools that scale alongside rapid AI advancements, platform design must evolve to let the models do their best work. @kevinhou22 on the evolution of @Antigravity at @aiDotEngineer.
items.whyItMatters: 讨论AI平台设计如何适应模型快速发展

items.author: @dzhng
items.text: My rule of thumb for fable class models now - if the model can't do something, 99% chance it's your fault
items.whyItMatters: 分享Fable模型使用的实用经验法则

items.author: @danshipper
items.text: the gremlins have arrived in fable
items.whyItMatters: Fable模型新动态，值得AI工程师跟踪

items.author: @nvidia
items.text: Open models are becoming the foundation for modern AI research. At #ICML2026, 145 accepted papers cite NVIDIA Nemotron models and datasets, 74 NVIDIA papers were accepted, and ~2,000 accepted papers cite NVIDIA GPUs.
items.whyItMatters: ICML 2026 数据显示 Nemotron 模型被广泛引用，反映开源模型研究趋势。

items.author: @TencentHunyuan
items.text: 🚀Hy3 is here. 295B MoE. Best in its size class. Rivals trillion-scale flagships. Reliable and affordable for most agentic usecases. Apache 2.0. Friendly for commercial use. FREE API for 2 weeks → https://openrouter.ai/tencent/hy3:free
items.whyItMatters: 新295B MoE模型发布，支持agentic workflow与coding，Apache 2.0开源

items.author: @shannholmberg
items.text: how to make your company AI-ready your agents are only as good as what they can read, so making a company AI-ready comes down to the setup underneath them, which are three layers > company brain... the wiki... the operating system
items.whyItMatters: 实用AI公司脑+agent架构框架，含wiki与embeddings实现细节

items.author: @ostrisai
items.text: Training Wan 2.1-1.3B to use Qwen3-VL-2B text encoder. Doing 33% text only, 33% VL only, and 33% both. Just pretraining the two text input linear layers for now. It is amazing how quickly a model can adapt to a different text encoder. This is 25,750 steps, BS of 10.
items.whyItMatters: 展示模型快速适配新text encoder的训练细节

items.author: @arena
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is back - it might be the most impressive model we've ever seen. @petergostev ran it through 60+ of the hardest 3D generations: modern cities, art, world wonders, and more. The results are incredible. Fable is clearly in a league of its own.
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5在复杂3D生成任务碾压，视觉/Agent能力新高度

items.author: @karpathy
items.text: incredible, ty for putting this together, i didn't appreciate that models would be able to create these awesome, rich, playable worlds that fuse knowledge and code.
items.whyItMatters: 模型生成可玩3D世界的质变，展示知识+代码融合能力。

items.author: @wandb
items.text: Introducing CoreWeave ARIA, the first AI research agent that runs autoresearch in your W&B dashboard. It reads your runs, finds what's working, and launches the next experiment itself. See it on @karpathy's nanochat, proposing configs and launching real training runs.
items.whyItMatters: 首款集成 W&B 的 AI 研究代理，可自动迭代实验，加速 LLM 训练流程。

items.author: @deanwball
items.text: one time, I reversed the whole “Chinese models write insecure code for American critical infrastructure” by seeing what American models do when writing for U.S. adversary critical infra. All models had some effect size, but the single largest was Claude on Russian infra.
items.whyItMatters: 模型代码安全性的跨国对比研究信号

items.author: @togethercompute
items.text: We're releasing the full slides for our 2 hr deepdive session from the AI Engineer World's Fair. We covered how we build inference engines to serve agentic workloads at trillion token production scale. Slides ⬇️
items.whyItMatters: 发布AI Engineer World's Fair推理引擎深度slides，覆盖trillion token agentic serving。

items.author: @polynoamial
items.text: Excellent work from @AISecurityInst investigating the impact of test-time compute budgets for frontier AI model evaluations. They make the case even more convincingly than I could!
items.whyItMatters: 前沿模型评测中 test-time compute 预算影响分析

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: It was great being on this panel with @vgcerf, @fchollet, Dave Patterson and @JohnOusterhout on building things that last at OpenFrontier yesterday! Probably the only time I’ll be on a panel with two Turing Award winners.
items.whyItMatters: Turing 奖得主讨论 AI 开放生态长期构建

items.author: @jeffboudier
items.text: Frontier-level AI you can actually host yourself... deploy @Zai_org GLM 5.2 on AMD Instinct MI300X - taking full advantage of the extensive memory capabilities to fit the full FP8 weights onto a single node, saving 50% on your compute bill
items.whyItMatters: Hugging Face + AMD 单节点部署前沿开源模型

items.author: @MistralAI
items.text: Customers are not an abstraction for us: we exist to help enterprises, public institutions, and industries build their own intelligence, so the value created from their data, workflows, feedback, and models accrues to them rather than to model providers.
items.whyItMatters: 强调企业自建智能的价值归属，指导 AI 产品战略。

items.author: @claudeai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is now available in Claude Tag. Announcing Built with Claude: Life Sciences hackathon... prize pool of $100k in credits.
items.whyItMatters: Claude Code/Fable新版+生命科学黑客松，$100k credits激励。

items.author: @RekaAILabs
items.text: World models are increasingly central to how agents learn and plan. Today we're releasing WorldModelGym, a benchmark built around a single question: if an agent uses a world model to choose among actions, does it pick the right one? We call this decision-based fidelity. 100+ tracks across Atari, Meta-World, DeepMind Co
items.whyItMatters: 新基准评估世界模型对Agent决策的影响

items.author: @lvwerra
items.text: Can agents collaborate to gather *all* information on a research topic and write it up it in a useful deep research wiki the size of many books? We launched a collab on RL for LLMs and they already made impressive progress in a few days: they processed 200+ papers and blogs, wrote 45 articles with 75k words / 250 pages
items.whyItMatters: 多Agent协作自动生成大规模研究wiki

items.author: @runwayml
items.text: Introducing Agent Skills. Build an ad campaign, create a commercial, localize your ads and more with a simple command. Type /, choose a Skill and Agent gets to work. Scale your marketing. On command.
items.whyItMatters: Runway Agent新增技能模块，支持营销自动化

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Databricks ranks #1 on NVIDIA’s SOL-ExecBench kernel leaderboard, in the L1 single operation track, powered by KDA (Kernel Design Agents) 🎉 What’s crazy is: we 100% leveraged AI agents to beat the competition. This is a sneak peek at recursive self-improvement.
items.whyItMatters: AI agents 自主优化 GPU kernel 登顶 NVIDIA 榜单

items.author: @matei_zaharia
items.text: Anything easy to verify is what agents will do best at! Kernel engineering is fairly easy to verify because kernels run fast (so you can attempt lots of versions), they're fairly simple to test numerically, and there is a clear, continuous objective function (speed).
items.whyItMatters: 易验证任务最适合 AI agents 自主迭代

items.author: @poolsideai
items.text: We are licensing Laguna XS 2.1 under OpenMDW-1.1. ... XS 2.1 is supported in vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT-LLM, Hugging Face Transformers, and @ollama, with BF16, FP8, INT4, and NVFP4 checkpoints available.
items.whyItMatters: Agentic coding 模型 Laguna XS 2.1 开源许可与多引擎支持，便于部署。

items.author: @maximelabonne
items.text: IFStruct now has a leaderboard on @huggingface! ... Winners🏆 🥇 @Google's gemma4 31B 🥈 @OpenAI's gpt-oss-20b 🥉 @NVIDIAAI nemotron-3-Nano
items.whyItMatters: 结构化输出指令遵循新 benchmark 上线，推动小模型工具调用能力。

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: ICML 2026 is almost here... 7 accepted papers. Our research spans agent training, scientific reasoning, and evaluations... Imitation Learning for Multi-turn LM Agents... SWE-Bench Pro...
items.whyItMatters: ICML多篇agent训练与SWE-Bench评估论文，含arxiv链接

items.author: @ValsAI
items.text: Today, we're launching Vals Public Sector: independent AI evaluation for government... We've spent years building industry-leading benchmarks alongside the top AI labs
items.whyItMatters: 政府AI评估平台上线，提供前沿模型基准与风险评估

items.author: @cursor_ai
items.text: Claude Fable 5 is available again in Cursor. It leads all models on CursorBench, but is the most expensive per task. See how Claude Fable 5 compares across every model: https://cursor.com/evals
items.whyItMatters: Fable 5登顶CursorBench，编码Agent新标杆与成本权衡

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: Nano Banana 2 Lite delivers text-to-image outputs in just 4 seconds. It’s designed for quicker ideation and workflows where speed and cost are the primary roadblocks.
items.whyItMatters: 新Gemini图像模型速度/成本优化，影响快速原型开发。

items.author: @GoogleDeepMind
items.text: Gemini Omni Flash shines in: Conversational video editing, Multimodal referencing... It’s available in @GoogleAIStudio, the Gemini API...
items.whyItMatters: 多模态视频编辑新能力，API可用，工程师可直接集成。

items.author: @ollama
items.text: Gemma 4 is now nearly 90% faster on Apple Silicon with Ollama using MLX! The speedup comes from improved multi-token prediction (MTP), now on by default.
items.whyItMatters: 本地Gemma 4 MLX加速90%，MTP默认开启，显著提升推理性能。
